programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is sogumm famous for her unique voice and heartfelt music! This artist made herself known to the public through one TV competition show in 2019. Thanks to her wide musical spectrum and outstanding producing skills she won the competition and soon joined the record label AOMG. Of course she continued to pleasantly surprised listeners under the label. Her first album Sobrightttttttt earned both critical and commercial success and that success led her to win the coveted Rookie Prize at the 17th Korean Music Awards. She has also collaborated with a numner of A-list artists including ZICO Oh Hyuk 10CM DJ Wegun and Hoody and her ever-evolving artistry definitely makes us anticipate her future as a musician. In October this year sogumm released her full-length album Precious securing her unique spot in the industry. In this episode sogumm performs Insecurity Prescription Precious and more to show off the essence of her artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented musician!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is risking city-pop songwriter nokdu! nokdu made his big debut in 2018 with the single Say My Name. As a graduate of The Liverpool Institute for Performing Arts founded by Paul McCartney and Mark Featherstone-Witty he covers a wide range of genres in his music ranging from Brit-pop to punk to R&B. Backed up by his academic background he boasts his outstanding ability not only as a songwriter but also a lyricist producer and singer. Also known for his stage manners he is quickly capturing the ears and souls of countless listeners. Currently he's taking part in the competition program Super Band 2. His fantastic performance in the show definitely makes us anticipate his future as a musician. In this episode nokdu performs Stay With Me Wona and more to show off the essence of his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the sensual pop-duo WeAreYoung! Composed of keyboardist and vocalist KIM Kyung-min and guitarist and vocalist GU Ki-hoon this duo made themselves known to the public with their heartfelt songs about youth and love. Thanks to their outstanding musicality they won the 2017 Shinhan Card Rookie Award the Silver Prize at the 2017 Martin Contest and Best Rookie at the Beautiful Mint Life 2018. This year they were chosen as recipients of the MUSE ON 2021 which aims to connect musicians and fans during the COVID-19 pandemic. Earlier this year WeAreYoung announced their much-anticipated comeback after completing their mandatory military duties and they are bound to impress once again with their songs A Day Full Of You Let's not do that Only I Love You and more. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet these two talented musicians!

programme.desc: Comedy Nights with Kapil was a popular Indian Hindi-language sketch comedy and celebrity talk show that combined a fictional household setting with a traditional interview format.

programme.title: Comedy Nights with Kapil-Avika & Tina Datta
programme.desc: Comedy Nights with Kapil was a popular Indian Hindi-language sketch comedy and celebrity talk show that combined a fictional household setting with a traditional interview format.

programme.title: Comedy Night Bachao-Sohail Khan
programme.desc: the show is known for its format where celebrity guests are subjected to harsh, tongue-in-cheek jokes and "roasted" by a team of comedians, including Krushna Abhishek, Bharti Singh, and Sudesh Lehri.

programme.title: Comedy Nights with Kapil-Shahrukh Khan
programme.desc: Comedy Nights with Kapil was a popular Indian Hindi-language sketch comedy and celebrity talk show that combined a fictional household setting with a traditional interview format.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Har Har Bhakti
programme.desc: Listen to Har Har Bhakti Devotional songs and start your day with praise of gods and goddesses. These songs are composed to inspire reverence, devotion, and connection with the divine.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.11
programme.desc: The intensive training for the Miss Korea finals begins, but Seoul contestants Oh Ji Young, Kim Jae Hee, Shin Sun Young, and Choi Soo Yeon, who share a room, get into a big fight over a trivial matter and receive penalty points. Before the finals, Ji Young refuses to sign a contract stating she must become the exclusive model for BaDa Cosmetics if selected as Miss Korea, and Kang Shik threatens that it will be difficult to become Miss Korea if she doesn't sign.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.12
programme.desc: The organizers of the Miss Korea pageant receive instructions that there is a problem with the Seoul 'Jin, Seon, Mi' monopolizing the main competition as the presidential election approaches. Director Ma and Director Yang move busily, but they sense an unusual atmosphere. During the training camp, Ji Young struggles due to Shin Sun Young's jealousy. Amidst her struggles, Yoon visits Ji Young.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.13
programme.desc: Director Ma, having learned about Jae Hee's father, listens to the whole story and then sends a message to Rep. Kim Suk Chul, Jae Hee's father, asking him to leave Jae Hee alone. Hyung Joon and the ViVi Cosmetics team prepare a press conference to expose the change in judges.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.14
programme.desc: Hyung Joon officially raises the issue of the judges. The organizers eventually accept Hyung Joon's proposal to replace the judges after the corruption scandal erupts. With the pre-screening also invalidated, the competition among the candidates for the gala night intensifies, and Oh Ji Young also does her best to prepare for the gala night. ViVi Cosmetics begins product manufacturing with the investment received from Yoon, and Yoon withdraws, upon learning this.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.15
programme.desc: Jae Hee goes into hiding after hearing her father Kim Suk Chul's proposal. Director Ma visits Kim Suk Chul and asks him to return Jae Hee, but instead faces a tax investigation. As the main competition begins, Oh Ji Young gradually starts to gain attention. However, due to Yoon's scheme, ViVi Cosmetics begins to face overdue promissory notes.

programme.title: Miss Korea Ep.16
programme.desc: The winner of the 1997 Miss Korea 'Jin' is finally announced. Ji Young, learning that ViVi Cosmetics is on the verge of bankruptcy, is heartbroken to realize that Hyung Joon was not at the main competition because of the company.

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Micro Jane & Jerry
programme.desc: In the hilarious and chaotic world of babysitting, Jerry's mischievous antics lead to a playful chase with Jane. Laughter and tears ensue as they _hinage in silly games, wrestle with chocolate, and explore the limits of their mischievous imaginations. Through their ups and downs, they find joy and connection, ultimately forming a bond filled with laughter, forgiveness, and unexpected surprises

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Invention Story
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Invention Story

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. At this scenic Pine Tree Kindergarten, all the cubs observe the world in their own creative and wondrous ways. Here you will learn everything from the value of friendship to exploring the mysteries of science and language.Bablu Dablu Cubs will teach kids how to help others while preparing themselves for life in this beautiful world. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer

programme.title: Armor Monster
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Squad 2
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Squad is a team of four: Bablu, Dablu, Lakha and Neva. They are the town's guardians, patrolling the forest and helping residents in need. Together, they overcome many challenges, interact with lots of different characters and help their friends break their bad habits.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Kungfu Master Of Zodiac
programme.desc: Welcome to 12 Zodiac Way! This is a story of the twelve animals of the Chinese Zodiac like you've never seen them before! programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles

programme.desc: On the way to their live show in Chile, the crew's entire plan falls apart while Georgie and some of the team are stranded in the Middle East. But in true M.O.D style, the guys maintain a positive attitude that leads to an insane trip.

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt
programme.desc: After a year full of intense shows, it's time to let off some steam. Georgie and his crew go on a euro road trip to party with M.O.D family members in the UK as well as motocross legend Edgar Torrenteras in his hometown of Barcelona.

programme.title: Dangers of Dark Fest
programme.desc: The fourth edition of Dark Fest gets underway. The first episode focuses on how the event was organized and experienced by the riders and audience.

programme.title: Dangers of Dark Fest
programme.desc: In this episode we discover the fanaticism of the riders. How do they achieve their success during such a dangerous event? The answer turns out to be friendship.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Lamborghini Huracan with its V10 is brutal, but there are still some people who think that even that isn't enough power yet. Therefore, the Swiss tuning company O.CT turned this raging bull into an even more furious beast. Also: the Cadillac CTS-V had been under pressure from the get-go. At first glance is looks like a regular limousine, but at a second glance it reveals its monstrous power.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: All over the world, Mercedes' S-Class is considered the model range that features the most elegant and luxurious limousines. We took a look at the German manufacturer's first convertible model in this class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the US brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Anybody who sees a car with a big rear wing suspects that there is a lot of power hidden under the hood that needs to be controlled, as these wings provide the necessary downforce. programme.title: Royal India with Samira
programme.desc: Samira explores Udaipur, a city renowned for its grand palaces and ancient royal lineages.

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Without humans, water brings chaos, flooding cities and awakening ancient forces.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Epic Ke Dus is a halfhour collated list of the top ten people, places or events of a chosen topic, examples of which include rivalries, thinkers and warriors. Each topic has been thoroughly researched and a panel of experts on the subject has carefully selected the stories that are fitting to be part of the topic. This panel is seen on the episodes giving their views on the events, the significance of the event and describing the mood of the era, publics reaction to these events and how it contributed to change the course of Indian history.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.desc: A new male okapi named Magani is paired with breeding veteran Kweli who has already had several calves, but Kweli develops congestive heart failure.

programme.title: Wild About
programme.desc: Bears today are divided into 8 species with some considered the largest land predators, though many are in fact omnivorous. They survive in our grasslands and mountains, tropical jungles and the cold harsh climate of the Artic.

programme.title: Wild About

programme.title: Python Hunters

programme.title: Python Hunters
programme.desc: After tracking down the green anaconda in Peru's Amazon basin, the hunters are determined to find another rare prize – the legendary black caiman. These elusive predators can grow up to 18 feet long, and their jungle habitat is too dangerous.

programme.title: Python Hunters
programme.desc: Back in Florida, Burmese python numbers are way down. But that doesn't mean the hunters are out of business. They take the pulse of a native biter, dance with a cobra, and then their mission goes nuclear to check on the health of Florida's crocodile.

programme.title: City Zoo
programme.desc: In this episode we learn to tell the difference between both the white and black rhino residents. Adrian and the zoo crew travel to the Lichtenburg Breeding centre to monitor a herd of white rhino.

programme.title: City Zoo

programme.title: All Girls Garage: LS1 Conversion

programme.title: Garage Squad
programme.desc: The crew tries to rescue a 1968 Chevy Camaro 327 convertible that needs an overhaul from bumper to bumper.

programme.title: Garage Squad

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: Around the globe, thousands of decommissioned naval vessels rot in dockyards. What can you do with these toxic time bombs? One solution is to clean them well, blow them up and sink them! Providing shelter and breeding grounds, countless fish and invertebrates colonize steel hulls.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Ian Gordon is embarking on a mission to observe the Port Jackson Shark during breeding season and explore the myth of their famous parenting methods.

programme.title: Animal Society

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: The Blue Realm

programme.title: Pinched by an Elephant Beetle!
programme.desc: The elephant beetle is huge, but its pinch may be even bigger. Coyote gets a close-up grip and tests its impressive strength.Coyote samples the infamous snake fruit. With a bizarre smell and unexpected flavor, it's a taste test that challenges more than just the tongue.

programme.title: Squirting Clams Pulled Up from the Muck!
programme.desc: Clams that squirt? Mark explores tidal flats where strange mollusks shoot water as a defense mechanism. It's weirder than you think.Bloodworms have teeth and aren't afraid to use them. Mark gets bitten and reveals why these creepy crawlers are misunderstood.

programme.title: Mantis Shrimp Punch Test!
programme.desc: The mantis shrimp packs the fastest punch in nature. Coyote shows how its explosive strike can shatter shells—and maybe more.Maggots vs feet? Coyote steps into 300,000 larvae to demonstrate their bizarre biological purpose and what happens when they swarm.

programme.title: Giant Fish Caught – Real River Monster!
programme.desc: A massive fish emerges from the river depths! Coyote wrestles this freshwater monster in one of the biggest catches of his career.The cicada killer wasp may look terrifying, but how dangerous is it really? Coyote gets stung to find out and compare it to others on his list.

programme.title: Pink Creature from Down Under! (Rare Turtle Frog)
programme.desc: With its pink skin and frog-like squeal, the turtle frog is one of the weirdest animals from Down Under. Mark finds and features this rarity.Coyote attempts one of his boldest moves: catching a crocodile barehanded. A high-stakes capture requiring skill, speed, and nerve.

programme.title: Sucked by Tiger Leeches!
programme.desc: Leeches attack in this jungle trek! Mark shows how tiger leeches feed and what it takes to remove them once they latch on.In the aftermath of wildfires, koalas need help. Coyote joins a rescue team in Australia to treat, care for, and rehome injured marsupials.

programme.title: Black vs. Green: Milking Deadly Mambas! (Final Snake Milking)
programme.desc: It's a venom showdown—black mamba vs green mamba. Coyote helps milk these snakes and explores which is more dangerous and why.

programme.title: Stung by a Venomous Neon Caterpillar!
programme.desc: The neon caterpillar's venom isn't just a defense—it's a chemical marvel. Coyote experiences its sting firsthand.Who's faster—Coyote or the world's fastest animal? He sets up a high-stakes race to test reflexes, speed, and a bit of humility.

programme.title: Bitten by Giant Soldier Ants!
programme.desc: Ants that don't just bite—they coordinate! Coyote is bitten by giant soldier ants to demonstrate their incredible defense strategy.

programme.title: 100,000 Endangered Bats vs. Deadly Fungus!
programme.desc: A deadly fungus threatens over 100,000 endangered bats. Coyote investigates the science, symptoms, and species affected by white-nose syndrome.

programme.title: For the Love of Wolves!
programme.desc: Wolves need our help. Coyote partners with conservationists to share the story of these vital predators and how to support their future.

programme.title: Stung by the Devil's Toilet Paper!
programme.desc: The Devil's Toilet Paper is a painful plant you'll never forget. Coyote experiences its stinging hairs and shows what NOT to do in the wild.Mark takes on the venomous stonefish, famous for the world's most painful sting. This one's not for the faint of heart.

programme.title: Snapping Turtle vs. Hand: Will It Break?!
programme.desc: Snapping turtles are no joke, but can they actually break bone? Coyote puts his own hand (and nerves) on the line to find out.The stinging nettle may look harmless, but it hides a nasty surprise. Coyote experiences the sting and explains its effects and remedies.

programme.title: Venomous Sewer Snake Found in Bangkok!
programme.desc: Urban exploration gets wild when Mark finds a rare venomous snake deep in the sewer systems of Bangkok.This insect doesn't bite—it sprays acid! Mark discovers a rare bug with an unbelievable defense mechanism aimed right at the eyes.

programme.title: Cook Like A Chef
programme.desc: Snout to tail cooking is Chef Derek Dammann's specialty, in this episode celebrating pork, he cooks everything but the squeal!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Miso is an extremely common ingredient in Japanese cuisine. Host Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen shows us how miso can add flavour and richness to any dish.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Charming host Vijaya Selvaraju demystifies a number of Indian dishes like Dal Soup in a crockpot and Fish in (three-ingredient) Red Chili Chutney.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about the sauces as Pailin Chongchitnant shows us how easy and versatile they are in Thai cuisine.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Warm host Natalia Machado makes a three course Argentinian meal that reminds her of her family.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Join engaging host, Bianca Osbourne, for a taste of two countries. First stop? Italy! Check out her recipe for succulent wild boar ribs, braised until tender, rolled in gremolata, and served over silky polenta. Next up? A culinary tribute to China, pairing lobster claw with chili oil, pomelo foam, and oyster sauce glazed bok choy. Every episode features a 'common ingredient', this time? It's noodles! Drool over two recipes: Italian classic Olio e Aglio next to chewy Chinese long Noodles tossed with Sichuan Chili Oil. For the big finale, Bianca blends Italian style with Chinese flavour for a one-of-a-kind CombiNation Plate: Kung Pao Pork Osso Bucco over Forbidden Black Rice Risotto... made with shiitake mushrooms and bright green edamame peas.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a weeknight meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: bratwurst and white bean cassoulet, warm sauerkraut with apples, and cherry crumble!

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the best fusion menu combining northern and southern inspirations! Josh brings together Canada and Vietnam, while Erica mashes up Canada and Mexico!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Host Mary Tang shows us some easy Chinese take-out dishes that are a true "wok" in the park! First, she rolls up some juicy wontons to douse in a bowl of hot seasoned chicken broth and delicious bok choy for a Chinese classic - Wonton Soup. Next, she gets out her frying pan for a crispy bowl of flavourful Chicken Chow Mein with egg noodles, savoury browned chicken, crunchy snow peas, and tasty baby corn. For an even simpler dish (and fan favourite), she then cooks up a hearty dish of Beef and Broccoli. Finally, Mary plays on different flavours with her Sweet and Sour Pork. Marinated pork cubes fried in a wonderful wok with fragrant garlic and ginger, sweet and tart red and green peppers, and succulent pineapple will definitely wake up your taste buds.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.desc: Home cook Vanessa Gianfrancesco uses her multi-cooker to whip up four comforting weeknight meals that are fast and easy.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: It's all about pork and peanuts, today's challenge is the letter "P." Chef Lauren Gulyas serves up an old school favourite, smothered pork chops. Using a blend of savoury ingredients, and with the help of her cast iron pan, Chef Lauren provides us with tips on how to keep your pork tender and tasty. Next, it's time for a West African peanut soup. Drizzling garlic, ginger and onions with extra virgin olive oil and letting them sizzle in a frying pan until the onions are soft brings out a sweetness that lends itself beautifully to the salty, earthy taste of peanuts. To finish, Chef Lauren puts an Asian twist on a southern classic, when she combines the two ingredients.

programme.desc: The job of a travel writer is to inspire, and to break myths. Far from being a war zone, our writers are stunned by Colombia's warmth and beauty, but a sellable story needs more edge. programme.title: Food Unknown
programme.desc: The nation of 7,000 islands has no problems with beach, sun, or sea but they suffer tremendously with cuisine image. Jonathan lands in Manila to discover the top chefs are well aware of the issue and, following their advice, he launches off on an expedition to find part of the solution. Driving from headhunting tribal villages, to step-back-in-time colonial towns, to restaurants in the shadow of the American military behemoth an intriguing story slowly pieces together. In the dense jungle one treasure stays buried while another comes literally out of the woodwork. But danger always lurks.. zombie moray eels, landslide prone passes, and forbidden fields behind the rice paddies.

programme.title: Food Unknown
programme.desc: Finland is that one Nordic country that is never on the global cuisine radar. However, the reserved Finns have been quietly perfecting their craft of foraging culture and incorporating it into their unique cuisine. Jonathan Legg explores the entire expanse of the country to understand it's cuisine, and the ethos of the country's top chefs from amazing locally sourced cuisine in Helsinki, to an expedition in Lapland to learn about foraging and the Finnish delicacy, reindeer!
